landing.heroSubtitle: Multi-step agentic reasoning, grounded retrieval, confidence scoring on every answer, and full provenance — built for governed knowledge work.
landing.howSubtitle: A six-layer architecture with policy enforcement at every hop.
landing.modesSubtitle: Built for end-users, administrators, and operators.
landing.modeWorkspaceDesc: Chat, browse archetypes, manage your team and documents.
landing.modeAdminDesc: Onboarding, model registry, prompt versioning, workspaces, audit.
landing.modeOpsDesc: FinOps, AIOps, LiveOps, DevOps — full operational visibility.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to give answers a paper trail?
landing.ctaSubtitle: Spin up your first workspace in minutes. Every answer cited, every model versioned, every decision logged.

pricing.title: Pricing built for governed knowledge
pricing.subtitle: Start solo, scale to enterprise. Every tier ships with citations and audit trails.

about.title: About Agentic Information Assistant
about.intro: AIA is a personal reimagining of Microsoft's PubSec Information Assistant — but rebuilt agentic-native. Where the original delivered a single-shot RAG response, AIA decomposes questions, retrieves, reasons, cites, and verifies — with every step audited and every decision traceable.
about.methodology: Every artifact in AIA — prompts, model selections, corpus snapshots — is versioned and fingerprinted. Changes flow through staged environments with red-team evals, recovery drills, and Elo-based arena testing before they reach production. When a dependency fails, the system degrades gracefully into a clearly-labeled partial mode rather than silently producing worse answers.
about.name: Name

chat.degradationDetail: — reranker unavailable, falling back to dense retrieval only.
chat.emptySubtitle: Every answer is grounded, cited, and confidence-scored. Try the prefilled question to see the agent reason.
chat.composerHelp: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline
chat.agentStreaming: Agent is reasoning… press Stop to interrupt.
